name: io.github.x7even/cloudcostsmcp
description: Anchor AI FinOps to real, live cloud pricing — AWS, GCP & Azure public and enterprise rates.

environmentVariables.name: OCC_GCP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: GCP free API key — required for GCP pricing, no billing account needed.

environmentVariables.name: OCC_AWS_ENABLE_COST_EXPLORER
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable effective/discounted AWS pricing via Cost Explorer ($0.01/call).

environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: AWS credentials — only needed for effective pricing (RI/Savings Plans). Public pricing works without credentials.

environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AWS secret key — paired with AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID for effective pricing.

environmentVariables.name: OCC_GCP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: GCP billing account ID — enables effective/contract pricing via Cloud Billing API.
